rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.0561, which governs reevaluation and reenrollment of students transferred out of bilingual education programs.
quote: Sec. 29.0561. EVALUATION OF TRANSFERRED STUDENTS; REENROLLMENT.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and bilingual education student evaluation statute.
